versions.version_description: Complete and readably formatted / two versions (basic/elaborate) / short tabs for intro and verse pattern / suggestions for voicings.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Key of F.


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Wait a minute, baby.[/tab]
Stay with me awhile.
Said you'd give me light
But you never told me about the fire.


[Chorus 1]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Drowning in the sea of love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Where everyone would love to drown.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But now its gone.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
It doesn't matter what for.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]
When you build your house,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Then call me home.[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 2]

[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
And he was just like a great dark wing[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Within the wings of a storm.[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
I think I had met my match.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
He was singing and undoing.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]
And undoing.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
Ooh, the laces.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Undoing the laces.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]Bbdim5[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh. Ooh.[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
Said Sara.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
You're the poet in my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbdim5[/ch]
Never change.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Never stop.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
But now it's gone.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
It doesn't matter what for.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
But when you build your house, you better call me home.[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Hold on. The night is coming.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And the starling flew for days.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
I'd stay home at night all the time.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
I'd go anywhere, anywhere, anywhere.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
Ask me and I'm there. Yeah.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
Ask me and I'm there, 'cause I care.[/tab]


[Chorus 1]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]
In the sea o' love[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
Where everyone would love to drown.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
But now it's gone.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
They say it doesn't matter anymore.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]
If you build your house,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Then please call me, call![/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]Dm[/ch]
Sara, you're the poet in my heart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbdim5[/ch]
Never change,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]
And don't you ever stop.[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
Well, now it's gone.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
No, it doesn't matter anymore.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bbdim5[/ch]
When you build your house,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
I'll come by.[/tab]

Aah, Sara.

Aah.

Ooh.
